Services.servicesTitle: Everything You Need Under One Technology Partner
Services.servicesDescription: From branding to enterprise software, BrandIT provides complete digital transformation services for businesses of every size.

Services.integration_desc: Connect applications, automate workflows and improve productivity.
Services.ecommerce_desc: Complete online stores with payment gateways and inventory management.
Services.maintenance_desc: Continuous updates, monitoring, security and technical support.
Services.transformation_desc: Helping organizations modernize processes through technology.

About.title: Building Africa's Future Through Technology.
About.description: BrandIT is a technology company helping businesses grow through software development, AI, cloud solutions, branding and digital marketing. We build digital ecosystems that drive measurable business results.
About.storyTitle: Technology That Solves Real Business Problems.
About.storyParagraph1: Businesses don't need more technology. They need technology that creates measurable business results.
About.storyParagraph2: BrandIT combines software engineering, artificial intelligence, branding, cloud services and digital marketing into one complete technology partner.
About.storyParagraph3: We build digital ecosystems that improve efficiency, strengthen customer experiences and accelerate sustainable growth.
About.purposeDescription: To empower African businesses with modern technology that creates lasting competitive advantages.
About.visionDescription: To become Africa's most trusted technology company for businesses embracing digital transformation.
About.missionHeading: Driven by Purpose. Focused on Impact.
About.missionIntro: Our mission and vision define how we build technology that helps businesses innovate, grow and succeed.
About.missionDescription: To empower businesses across Africa with world-class technology, branding and digital solutions that create measurable business growth.
About.visionCardDescription: To become Africa's most trusted technology company by building innovative digital products and long-term partnerships that transform businesses.
About.valuesTitle: The Principles That Guide Everything We Do
About.valuesDescription: These values shape how we design, build and support every solution for our clients.
About.value1Description: We embrace new technologies to create smarter solutions.
About.value2Description: Every project is crafted with precision and attention to detail.
About.value3Description: Transparency, honesty and trust define every partnership.
About.value4Description: We work closely with clients to achieve shared success.
About.value5Description: We focus on measurable business growth, not just project delivery.
About.value6Description: Technology evolves rapidly, and we evolve with it.
About.faqDescription: Answers to the most common questions about BrandIT and how we work.
About.faq1Answer: We provide software development, SaaS platforms, websites, mobile apps, AI solutions, cloud services, branding, digital marketing, IT consulting, systems integration and digital transformation services.
About.faq2Question: Do you work with businesses outside Africa?
About.faq2Answer: Yes. Although BrandIT focuses on helping African businesses grow, we work with companies and organizations worldwide.
About.faq3Question: How long does a project take?
About.faq3Answer: Every project is different. Small websites may take a few weeks, while enterprise software and SaaS platforms can take several months depending on complexity.
About.faq4Answer: Yes. We provide maintenance, security updates, hosting, monitoring and long-term technical support after launch.
About.faq5Question: Can BrandIT redesign an existing website or application?
About.faq5Answer: Absolutely. We modernize existing websites, mobile apps and software systems to improve performance, security and user experience.
About.faq6Answer: Simply contact our team through the contact page or WhatsApp. We'll schedule a discovery session to understand your goals before proposing the best solution.

Contact.title: Let's Build Something Exceptional Together.
Contact.description: Whether you need a website, software, SaaS platform, AI solution, branding or digital marketing strategy, BrandIT is ready to help bring your vision to life.
Contact.officeDescription: Serving clients across Africa and worldwide.
Contact.emailDescription: Send us your project requirements anytime.
Contact.formDescription: Complete the form below and our team will contact you within 24 hours.
Contact.name: Full Name
Contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
Contact.visitDescription: Whether you prefer to meet in person or work remotely, BrandIT is ready to help your business grow.
Contact.coverageDescription: We proudly serve businesses throughout Côte d'Ivoire, across Africa, and internationally.
Contact.whyDescription: We don't just deliver projects—we build long-term partnerships focused on measurable business growth.
Contact.why1Description: Efficient planning and execution without compromising quality.
Contact.why2Description: Your ideas, data and business information are handled with confidentiality.
Contact.why3Description: We work with businesses across Africa and around the world.
Contact.why4Description: Experienced designers, developers and strategists working together on your project.
Contact.why5Description: Every solution is designed to increase efficiency, revenue and customer satisfaction.
Contact.why6Description: We remain your technology partner long after your project goes live.

Blog.empty: We're preparing valuable content that will help businesses grow with technology.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Your privacy is important to BrandIT. This page explains how we collect, use and protect your personal information.
Privacy.section1Content: We may collect information you voluntarily provide, including your name, email address, phone number, company details and project requirements submitted through our website.
Privacy.section2Content: We use your information to respond to enquiries, deliver our services, improve customer experience, communicate project updates and provide relevant information about our services.
Privacy.section3Content: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve functionality, analyze website performance and enhance your browsing experience.
Privacy.section4Content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, disclosure or misuse.
Privacy.section5Content: We may use trusted third-party providers for hosting, analytics, email delivery and payment processing. These providers only receive the information necessary to perform their services.
Privacy.section6Content: You may request access to, correction of or deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting BrandIT.
Privacy.section7Content: If you have questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact BrandIT through our Contact page or by email.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.description: These terms govern the use of BrandIT's website and services.
Terms.section1Content: By using our website or engaging our services, you agree to these Terms and Conditions.
Terms.section2Content: BrandIT provides software development, SaaS, websites, mobile applications, branding, digital marketing, cloud services, AI solutions and IT consulting.
Terms.section3Content: Project fees, payment schedules and deliverables are agreed upon before work begins.
Terms.section4Content: Unless otherwise agreed in writing, BrandIT retains ownership of its proprietary frameworks, tools and reusable assets.
Terms.section5Content: Clients are responsible for providing accurate information, approvals and required content in a timely manner.
Terms.section6Content: BrandIT shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.
Terms.section7Content: We may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.description: This page explains how BrandIT uses cookies and similar technologies.
Cookies.section1Content: Cookies are small files stored on your device that help websites function correctly and improve user experience.
Cookies.section2Content: BrandIT uses cookies to remember preferences, improve website performance and understand how visitors interact with our website.
Cookies.section3Content: We may use trusted third-party services such as Google Analytics and Meta Pixel, which may also place cookies on your device.
Cookies.section4Content: Most web browsers allow you to control or disable cookies through their settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect certain website features.
Cookies.section5Content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be published on this page.

ServicesPage.title: Technology Solutions That Grow Businesses.
